evals.name: generate-from-spec
evals.prompt: Generate E2E tests for increment 0042-auth-flow. The spec.md has 2 user stories: US-001 (Login) with AC-US1-01 (see login form), AC-US1-02 (submit credentials), AC-US1-03 (see dashboard after login); US-002 (Logout) with AC-US2-01 (click logout), AC-US2-02 (redirected to login page).
evals.expected_output: Playwright test files created in e2e/ directory with one file per user story and AC-IDs in test titles

assertions.text: Reads spec.md from .specweave/increments/0042-auth-flow/spec.md to extract ACs
Creates e2e/us-001.spec.ts with test titles containing AC-US1-01, AC-US1-02, AC-US1-03
Creates e2e/us-002.spec.ts with test titles containing AC-US2-01, AC-US2-02
Checks for playwright.config.ts before generating test files
Groups AC-US1-01 through AC-US1-03 as a journey since they are sequential login steps

evals.name: run-and-report
evals.prompt: Run E2E tests for increment 0042-auth-flow and produce the AC-mapped report. Tests already exist in e2e/ directory.
evals.expected_output: Playwright tests executed, e2e-report.json written to reports/ with AC-ID mapping and pass/fail summary

assertions.text: Runs npx playwright test with --reporter=json flag
Report contains summary object with total, passed, failed, skipped counts
Report results array maps test outcomes to AC-IDs extracted from test titles

evals.name: a11y-scan
evals.prompt: Run E2E tests with accessibility auditing for increment 0042-auth-flow. Include WCAG 2.1 AA compliance checks.
evals.expected_output: Tests run with @axe-core/playwright scans, violations attached to per-AC results in report

assertions.text: Checks for @axe-core/playwright installation before running a11y scans
Uses AxeBuilder with wcag2a, wcag2aa, wcag21aa tags
Attaches a11y violations to per-AC result entries in e2e-report.json
Reports zero violations as { violations: [], passes: N }

evals.name: no-playwright-detected
evals.prompt: Generate E2E tests for increment 0099-new-feature. The project has no playwright.config.ts and no @playwright/test in package.json.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects missing Playwright and outputs installation instructions without generating files

assertions.text: Searches for playwright.config.ts and playwright.config.js in project root and common locations
Outputs error message mentioning npm init playwright@latest for installation
Does NOT create any test files or e2e-report.json
